hero.title: Professional Services You Can Trust
hero.subtitle: We help businesses grow with modern, thoughtful solutions tailored to your unique needs.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Who we are and what drives us
about.body: We are a team of dedicated professionals with years of experience delivering results for our clients. Our approach combines deep expertise with a genuine commitment to understanding your unique needs.
about.secondaryBody: Based in Athens, we work with businesses across Greece and Europe, bringing modern solutions to every project we take on.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: What we offer
services.description: We provide a comprehensive range of professional services designed to help your business grow and succeed.

items.title: Business Consulting
items.description: Strategic advice and hands-on support to help your business reach its full potential.

items.title: Market Analysis
items.description: In-depth research and insights to help you understand your market and competition.

items.title: Growth Strategy
items.description: Tailored growth plans that align with your goals, resources, and timeline.

items.title: Client Relations
items.description: Building and maintaining strong client relationships that drive long-term success.

items.title: Innovation Planning
items.description: Future-focused strategies that keep your business ahead of the curve.

items.title: Performance Tracking
items.description: Clear metrics and reporting so you always know how your business is performing.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Client stories
testimonials.description: Do not just take our word for it. Here is what people who have worked with us have to say.

items.quote: Working with this team completely transformed how we approach our business. The results speak for themselves.
items.author: Maria Papadopoulou

items.quote: Professional, responsive, and genuinely invested in our success. I could not recommend them more highly.
items.author: Nikos Alexandrou

items.quote: They took the time to really understand our needs before proposing anything. Refreshing and effective.
items.author: Elena Christodoulou

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Got questions?
faq.description: Everything you need to know. Can't find an answer? Get in touch with us directly.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Getting started is simple. Reach out to us via the contact form or give us a call, and we will schedule a free initial consultation to understand your needs.

items.question: How long does a typical project take?
items.answer: Project timelines vary depending on scope and complexity. A standard project typically takes between 2 and 6 weeks from kickoff to delivery.

items.question: Do you work with small businesses?
items.answer: Absolutely. We work with businesses of all sizes, from solo founders to established companies. Our approach is always tailored to your specific situation.

items.question: What does the process look like?
items.answer: We start with a discovery call to understand your goals, followed by a proposal, then move into delivery with regular check-ins throughout the project.

items.question: Do you offer ongoing support after the project?
items.answer: Yes. We offer ongoing support packages for clients who need continued assistance after their project is complete. Ask us about our retainer options.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's talk
contact.description: Have a project in mind or just want to explore how we can help? Fill in the form and we will get back to you within one business day.
contact.successMessage: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We will be in touch shortly.
contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
